column8: orig (sinTable)[(angle-0x400)&0xfff]; port mirrors via cosFloatTable[((angle+0xfffffc00u)&0xfff)] (sin via cos offset). Pilot-trig emit is instrumentation only.
orig returns (g_sinCosLut_fixed12)[angle&0xfff]; port s_cosFixedTable[angle&0xfffu] identical LUT semantics with ensure_lut init guard.
